title: Melanoseris aitchisoniana
taxonomy: Melanoseris aitchisoniana is classified within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Melanoseris, which is a group of flowering plants. Further classification places Melanoseris aitchisoniana within the tribe Senecioneae. The species is native to the Himalayan region, where it can be found growing in high-altitude areas. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and molecular analysis.
